summary: Comprehensive system testing of Thrifty Curator admin dashboard completed successfully. All major features tested on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Backend APIs: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All sections, modals, and critical features working correctly.

minor.issue: Old test file uses wrong auth schema - requires admin_code field for admin login, not just email

issues: Minor horizontal overflow of 8px detected (scrollWidth 398px vs viewportWidth 390px) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

console_warnings.issue: <span> elements wrapping <tr> inside <tbody> - caused by Emergent debug wrapper, not application code

admin_login.desktop: PASS - Code '4399' logs in as Matthew Guzman

payroll_summary_section.shows_data: PASS - Shows $225.00 current period, month, year totals

employee_portal_view.clock_in_confirmation: PASS - Confirmation dialog shows with Cancel/Yes buttons

payroll_modal.shows_data: PASS - Shows period type, rates, employee filters

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in console about <span> wrapping <tr> elements - this is from Emergent debug wrapper, not app code, doesn't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All comprehensive system tests passed. Key features verified: admin login with codes 4399/0826, all collapsible sections (Payroll Summary, All Employees, Time Entries, Form Submissions, Mileage Tracking, Check Records, W-9 Review), all modals (Add/Edit/Remove Employee, Payroll, Shift Reports, Employee Portal View), clock in/out confirmation flow, X button sizes (all 40x40px), mobile responsiveness (390x844). Minor 8px horizontal overflow on mobile noted but doesn't affect functionality.
